title: SIREN — Looping SING (VEC03X → VEC04X) (Robotron)
tldr: SING engine driven with *two* vectors in alternation — `VEC03X` then `VEC04X` then back. Produces the classic two-pitch air-raid siren wail.
how: A small wrapper around SING that alternates between two parameter blocks on each cycle of the engine. The two vectors define the high and low pitches of the siren; the alternation rate sets the warble speed.
watch: Spectrogram — two pitches alternating in a continuous wail.
Stage swimlane — repeating SIREN / SING band pairs.
